snippet.title: Dominguez on lessons from Siemens Energy's recent profit loss
snippet.description: “All technologies, as they’re being developed, are going to have these bumps in the road. And that doesn’t mean they’re not good technologies or reliable … But there still will be bumps … And that’s one of the reasons you’ve got to get started now. If you’re trying to get to a net-zero economy by 2050, understanding how long it takes to develop and build key infrastructure, like the green energy economy, the hydrogen economy—all of that compels immediate action.” - Joe Dominguez

snippet.title: Dominguez on the EPA’s latest fossil fuel restrictions
snippet.description: “We feel confident that EPA is on the right path because we have been at the forefront of developing some of the technologies that will allow existing natural gas fire generation to comply with these rules." - Joe Dominguez

localized.title: Dominguez on the EPA’s latest fossil fuel restrictions
localized.description: “We feel confident that EPA is on the right path because we have been at the forefront of developing some of the technologies that will allow existing natural gas fire generation to comply with these rules." - Joe Dominguez

snippet.title: Dominguez on permitting reform
snippet.description: “The bigger problem in our industry is this, we had a bad design from the beginning… I think it’s something that’s really poorly understood, but yet fundamental for us to understand going forward … As we endeavor to build out a system that is able to cover the peak demand in July and August, then by definition you’re going to have way too much power in April and October … If we're really going to get anywhere, we need resources that operate when we need them to operate. And not put excess power onto the grid, frankly, when we don't need the power." - Joe Dominguez

snippet.title: Power to the Planet - Aspen Ideas: Climate
snippet.description:
The nation’s foremost producer of carbon-free energy is an electric utility with an ambitious strategy of nuclear, clean hydrogen, and direct-air capture. Hear from the leader who’s driving this innovation and challenging other utilities to follow.

Speakers: Joe Dominguez and Amy Harder

This is a conversation from Aspen Ideas: Climate in Miami Beach, Florida.

Now in its second year, Aspen Ideas: Climate is co-organized by the Aspen Institute and the City of Miami Beach. In addition to plenary sessions, breakout discussions, announcements, and private roundtables, the event features a tech expo and career fair, a climate solutions showcase, a public arts program, and excursions. Aspen Ideas: Climate takes place March 6–9, 2023. #AspenIdeasClimate

snippet.title: Kevin Parada gets promoted & Pete Alonso rumors circulate as the Mets trudge on | The Mets Pod | SNY
snippet.description:
Connor Rogers and Joe DeMayo are back with an all-new episode of The Mets Pod presented by Tri-State Cadillac, as the big league Mets have struggled and the farm keeps on raking. 

Connor and Joe look at the improvements by David Peterson and Tylor Megill and break down Pete Alonso's future with the team. Later, the show takes a look at the minor league Mets including Ronny Mauricio, Drew Gilbert, Luisangel Acuna, Ryan Clifford, Jett Williams, and the recently promoted Kevin Parada. Connor takes the lead on Joe on the scoreboard and provide new predictions for the upcoming week of baseball. 

The guys finish with a mailbag question about the future of the Mets pitching staff and whether a team will pick up veteran Carlos Carrasco on waivers. Be sure to subscribe to the show at Apple Podcasts, Spotify, or wherever you get your podcasts.

snippet.title: Cigars For Special Occasions
snippet.description:
This week on The Cigar Authority broadcasting live from the Toscano Sound Stage in Salem, New Hampshire… Are you looking for just the right cigar for that Special Occasion? What about a not so social Occasion?  Then you tuned in to the right episode of The Cigar Authority... 

For those of you that are members of the care package.... We will be smoking the DBL Amarillo Belicoso in the first hour... Funny story, in true Dominican fashion DBL waited until the last minute to send us the cigars. We discussed size with them and they said they would send the Toro, so we fired off the post card in the Care Package to the printers and in the meantime, they sent the Belicoso. Will Dave lose his mind? Tune in to find out... Meanwhile for those of you who get the prime we will smoke a Jose Dominguez Gordito in the second hour. 

Join us for all of this and the usual suspects including the VS Question of the Week, Offer of the Day, Cigar News, the email of the week and a peek into the Asylum. 


Join us for our regular The Cigar Authority broadcasts live on Saturday at 12noon or on our website, TheCigarAuthority.com as well as Facebook Live, YouTube and is available on your favorite podcast catcher.
#Cigarillos #Cigars #QuickSmokes

snippet.title: Key Takeaways from Your Money of Your Life
snippet.description:
"Your Money or Your Life is a game-changing personal finance book by authors Robin and Dominguez that helps readers take charge of their finances. It provides a step-by-step roadmap for financial success, including tracking spending, creating a budget, reducing expenses, increasing income, saving, investing, and making mindful spending a priority. The book encourages readers to reassess their relationship with money and achieve financial freedom and stability."

Key Consepts: The 9 steps in the book are…
00:00 Start
00:31 Step 1 Track your spending and income for one month
01:29 Step 2 Create a net worth statement
02:36 Step 3 Make a list of all your fixed expenses and variable expenses.
04:00 Step 4 create a budget
05:23 Step 5 determine your hourly wage
06:40 Step 6 Track your time and money in order to identify areas where you are wasting both.
07:47 Step 7 Start cutting back on expenses and increasing income.
09:20 Step 8 Invest in yourself and your future by saving and investing a portion of your income
10:34 Step 9 Live below your means and enjoy the freedom that comes with financial independence

Money Mindset, Financial Freedom

snippet.title: Top 10  Financial Education Books for Wealth Creation | #shorts, #viral  Part I
snippet.description:
Are you looking to enhance your financial knowledge and gain insights into wealth creation? Look no further! In this captivating and informative Shorts video, we have carefully curated a list of 10 must-read financial education books that are guaranteed to empower you to take control of your finances, make sound investment decisions, and ultimately build wealth.
"Rich Dad Poor Dad" by Robert Kiyosaki:
In this groundbreaking book, Robert Kiyosaki shares his personal experiences and lessons learned from his own "rich dad" and "poor dad." Discover valuable financial insights as he contrasts the mindset and strategies of these two fathers, providing you with an eye-opening perspective on wealth creation.
"The Total Money Makeover" by Dave Ramsey:
Dave Ramsey's transformative book presents a step-by-step plan to help you achieve financial freedom. With a focus on debt reduction and practical money management techniques, you'll learn how to budget effectively, save money, and build wealth while embracing a debt-free lifestyle.
"A Random Walk Down Wall Street" by Burton Malkiel:
Navigate the unpredictable world of investing with confidence using the insights shared by Burton Malkiel. This book offers a comprehensive guide to long-term investment strategies, highlighting the importance of diversification and dispelling common myths about the stock market.
"The Intelligent Investor" by Benjamin Graham:
Considered a classic in the world of finance, Benjamin Graham's "The Intelligent Investor" provides invaluable lessons in value investing. By focusing on fundamental analysis, assessing risk, and avoiding speculative behavior, Graham teaches you how to make informed investment decisions.
"I Will Teach You to Be Rich" by Ramit Sethi:
Ramit Sethi's book is a practical and engaging guide to personal finance. Discover how to optimize your earnings, automate your finances, and invest wisely to achieve financial success while enjoying the present. Sethi's strategies are aimed at creating a rich life by aligning your financial goals with your values.
"The Little Book of Common Sense Investing" by John C. Bogle:
John C. Bogle, the founder of Vanguard Group, emphasizes the power of low-cost index fund investing. In this book, he advocates for a simple, long-term investment approach that minimizes fees and maximizes returns, making it an essential read for anyone interested in passive investing.

"The Millionaire Next Door" by Thomas J. Stanley and William D. Danko:
Delve into the lives of self-made millionaires in "The Millionaire Next Door." Authors Thomas J. Stanley and William D. Danko reveal the common traits, habits, and mindset of individuals who have achieved financial success. This book challenges conventional notions of wealth and provides invaluable insights for those striving to build their own fortunes.
"Your Money or Your Life" by Vicki Robin and Joe Dominguez:
Reevaluate your relationship with money and discover the path to financial independence and fulfillment. Vicki Robin and Joe Dominguez provide practical tools to track your spending, align your expenses with your values, and ultimately achieve financial freedom by prioritizing what truly matters.
"Think and Grow Rich" by Napoleon Hill:
Immerse yourself in the timeless classic "Think and Grow Rich" and learn the secrets to success and abundance. Napoleon Hill's principles, based on extensive research and interviews with successful individuals, focus on harnessing the power of your mind, setting goals, and developing a burning desire to achieve greatness.
"The Richest Man in Babylon" by George S. Clason:
Transport yourself to ancient Babylon through the parables in George S. Clason's book. Discover timeless financial lessons woven into captivating stories that teach the importance of saving, investing, and managing money wisely. Gain insights into wealth-building principles that have stood the test of time.
Whether you are just starting your financial journey or seeking to refine your knowledge, these 10 books offer a wealth of information and practical advice to help you on your path to financial literacy and success.
Watch this engaging Shorts video now and embark on a transformative journey towards financial empowerment and wealth creation. Explore the strategies, concepts, and real-life examples shared by renowned authors who have paved the way to financial prosperity. Don't miss out on this opportunity to expand your financial knowledge and take charge of your financial future.
#FinancialEducation #WealthCreation #MoneyManagement #InvestingTips #FinancialBooks #PersonalFinance #DebtFreeLiving #FinancialFreedom #PassiveInvesting #FinancialLiteracy #BuildWealth #SuccessPrinciples
